title: legal-question-bundle/v1
description: Escalation payload emitted by ZONING-001 (consumer simplifier) when stakes rise (RULE-05) and accepted by LAW-LANDUSE-001 (lawyer-grade opinion). Carries the parcel, the question, and the consumer-side zoning context already gathered so the lawyer-grade worker does not re-pull from scratch. The escalation ladder: free consumer simplifier -> paid lawyer-grade opinion.

zoningContext.description: What the consumer worker already established — passed forward so LAW-LANDUSE-001 starts warm. Reference, not authority: the lawyer-grade worker re-verifies anything it cites.

userSupplied.description: Anything the user uploaded (CC&Rs, prior approvals). Reagan Rule — carried forward with verified:false.

notes.compliance: This bundle is a question + context handoff, not an opinion. LAW-LANDUSE-001 produces the legal opinion; ZONING-001 never gives binding legal advice.
notes.reagan_rule_application: userSupplied items carry verified:false; the receiving worker re-verifies before citing.
notes.eh01_application: zoningContext.citedSections are reference pointers; LAW-LANDUSE-001 re-resolves any authority it relies on via its own authorityResolver (no inherited-recall).
